channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion Breaks Down in Tears at ‘Moulin Rouge!’ After Klay Thompson Breakup
item.description:
[Energetic music fades out, and the host's voice takes over]
Host: Welcome back to "Trending Now" on Billboard. We've got some emotional news to share with you today. Megan Thee Stallion, the 31-year-old rapper, got teary-eyed on stage during her performance in Moulin Rouge! The Musical on Saturday, just hours after announcing her breakup with NBA star Klay Thompson.
[Soft music plays in the background]
Host: According to fan-captured footage, Megan was seen wiping away tears during the curtain call, still in costume, as the audience gave her a standing ovation. This emotional moment comes after she confirmed her split from Thompson on social media, citing cheating allegations and a lack of monogamy.
[Clip of Megan Thee Stallion's music plays briefly]
Host: Megan, a three-time Billboard Hot 100 chart-topper, has been making waves with her Broadway debut in Moulin Rouge! as the first female-identifying performer in the role of Zidler. Her eight-week engagement at New York's Al Hirschfeld Theatre runs through May 17.
[Music transitions back to the host]
Host: In a statement obtained by Billboard, Megan said, "Trust, fidelity, and respect are non-negotiable for me in a relationship, and when those values are compromised, there's no real path forward." The couple, who started dating in summer 2025, had seemingly been going strong, with Thompson even naming his boat after her last Thanksgiving.
[Soft music continues to play]
Host: It's clear that Megan is prioritizing herself and moving forward with peace and clarity. We'll be keeping an eye on her journey and wishing her all the best. That's all for today's episode of "Trending Now" on Billboard. Thanks for tuning in!
[Music fades out with a final note]
